version_description: Completed lyrics and different chord variation.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Chorus 1]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
Pilot of the Airwaves, here is my request[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
You don't have to play it but I hope you'll do your best[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A7[/ch]                           [ch]Dm[/ch]
I've been list'nin' to your show on the radio[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Gsus[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
And you seem like a friend to me[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]
  Play me records of your choice, I don't mind[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]
I'd be  happy just to hear your voice[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]D7sus[/ch]     [ch]D7[/ch]
Sayin' this is for the girl who didn't sign her name[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]                          [ch]Gsus[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Guess she needs a dedication just the same[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
 Late at night I'm still listening[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
 Don't waste my time chasin' sleep[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
 People say I look weary[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D7sus[/ch]           [ch]D7[/ch]        [ch]D7sus[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]
Well, that's just the company I keep[/tab]

[Refrain]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Ooh, you make the nighttime race[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
Ooh, I don't need to see your face[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]
You're soundin' good (sounding good)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Sounding good to me[/tab]

[Chorus 2]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
Pilot of the Airwaves, here is my request[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
You don't have to play it but I hope you'll do your best[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A7[/ch]                           [ch]Dm[/ch]
I've been list'nin' to your show on the radio[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Gsus[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
And you seem like a friend to me[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
 Late at night I'm still listening[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
 Don't waste my time chasin' sleep[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
 People say I look weary[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D7sus[/ch]           [ch]D7[/ch]        [ch]D7sus[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]
Well, that's just the company I keep[/tab]

[Refrain 2]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
Ooh, you make the nighttime race[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
Ooh, I don't need to see your face[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]
You're soundin' good (sounding good)[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
Sounding good to me[/tab]

[Chorus 3]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
Pilot of the Airwaves, here is my request[/tab]
[tab] [ch]F[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
You don't have to play it but I hope you'll do your best[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A7[/ch]                           [ch]Dm[/ch]
I've been list'nin' to your show on the radio[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Gsus[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
And you seem like a friend to me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A7[/ch]                          [ch]Dm[/ch]
Oh I've been listing to your show on the radio[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Gsus[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
And you seem like a friend to me Fade[/tab]


Chords by Apollo & Ireen Cave
